qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: A relational schema for a train reservation database is given below. passenger(pid, pname, age) reservation(pid, class, tid) What pids are returned by the following SQL query for the above instance of the tables? SELECT pid FROM Reservation WHERE class='AC' AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM Passenger WHERE
